# daytona_sandbox_port_preview_url (Data Source)

Reads a preview URL for a Daytona sandbox port.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "daytona_sandbox_port_preview_url" "example" {
  sandbox_id_or_name = "my-sandbox"
  port               = 3000
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `port` (Number) Sandbox port number.
- `sandbox_id_or_name` (String) Sandbox ID or name.

### Optional

- `organization_id` (String) Daytona organization ID to send as `X-Daytona-Organization-ID`.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Data source identifier.
- `sandbox_id` (String) Sandbox ID.
- `token` (String, Sensitive) Sandbox port preview access token.
- `url` (String, Sensitive) Sandbox port preview URL.
